title: The Crash
shortSynopsis: A teen slams her car into a building, killing her boyfriend and his friend. What seems like a tragic accident becomes a murder case in this documentary.

title: Swapped
shortSynopsis: A tiny woodland creature and a majestic bird suddenly swap bodies, forcing them to team up to survive the wildest adventure of their lives.

title: Ladies First
shortSynopsis: An arrogant but charismatic ladies' man finds his life of money, power and casual flings upended when he wakes up in a parallel world dominated by women.

title: Goat
shortSynopsis: A young goat chases his dream of playing professional roarball as he revitalizes a legendary team and proves his small stature packs a big punch.

title: Remarkably Bright Creatures
shortSynopsis: While working nights at a small-town aquarium, a widow bonds with a clever octopus and an adrift young man in this moving drama based on the bestseller.

title: Apex
shortSynopsis: A grieving woman pushing her limits on a solo adventure in the Australian wild is ensnared in a twisted game with a cunning killer who thinks she's prey.

title: Stolen Baby: The Murder of Heidi Broussard
shortSynopsis: When a young mother and her newborn baby disappear, police suspect her best friend may be involved. Based on the true story of Heidi Broussard's murder.

title: In Her Shoes
shortSynopsis: Estranged sisters Maggie and Rose have nothing in common — except, it seems, a long-lost grandmother who helps them find their way back to each other.

title: No Hard Feelings
shortSynopsis: A bartender who's down on her luck takes on an unusual challenge when a wealthy couple hires her to romance their socially awkward son.

title: KPop Demon Hunters
shortSynopsis: When K-pop superstars Rumi, Mira and Zoey aren't selling out stadiums, they're using their secret powers to protect their fans from supernatural threats.

title: KARTAVYA
shortSynopsis: With his family's safety at stake and menacing threats closing in, a police officer must decide how far he'll go to uphold his duty.

title: Bride of the Year
shortSynopsis: When Lienkie's dream of building a family of her own comes crashing down, she hatches a devious plan to win "Bride of the Year" and get back at her ex.

title: Coco Before Chanel
shortSynopsis: Follow fashion legend Coco Chanel's storied ascension from orphan to seamstress, cabaret singer and ultimately, the queen of Parisian haute couture.

title: The Bus: A French Football Mutiny
shortSynopsis: This documentary revisits the French football team's controversial 2010 World Cup and the bus strike that sparked global headlines and national outrage.

title: Dhurandhar The Revenge (Raw & Undekha)
shortSynopsis: Driven by personal tragedy, Hamza dives deeper into his deep-cover mission to ruin Pakistan's criminal underworld in this unseen sequel to "Dhurandhar."

title: Number One
shortSynopsis: Ha-min sees a mysterious countdown whenever he eats food cooked by his mom. Believing she'll die when it hits zero, he distances himself to protect her.

title: My Dearest Assassin
shortSynopsis: A woman whose rare blood type puts a target on her back finds protection in the arms of the deadly assassin she loves — together, they fight to survive.

title: Je m’appelle Agneta
shortSynopsis: Craving a fresh start, recently unemployed Agneta accepts an au pair gig in Provence that turns into an indulgent escape — and an unexpected awakening.

title: Village of the Dead
shortSynopsis: After disrespecting an offering found on their hike, four friends become trapped in an otherworldly village where humans are sacrificed for their souls.

title: Hidden Enemy
shortSynopsis: A woman realizes her happy marriage is under threat after befriending her seemingly innocent neighbor — whose actions carry an ulterior motive.

title: Nemesis: Season 1
shortSynopsis: A relentless LAPD cop becomes obsessed with taking down the master thief behind a string of daring heists — and only one can come out on top.

title: The Boroughs: Season 1
shortSynopsis: In a seemingly perfect retirement community, a crew of unlikely heroes must stop an otherworldly threat from stealing the one thing they don't have: time.

title: Worst Ex Ever: Season 2
shortSynopsis: From murderous vendettas to violent kidnappings, these real-life accounts of abuse and survival capture what happens when love takes a nightmarish turn.

title: The Roast of Kevin Hart
shortSynopsis: Kevin Hart is in the hot seat and ready for all the smoke as roastmaster Shane Gillis and a dais of A‑listers unleash a raw and ruthless night of laughs.

title: Man on Fire: Season 1
shortSynopsis: Haunted by his past and hunted by his enemies, a Special Forces veteran fights to keep a teenage girl alive on the deadly streets of Rio de Janeiro.

title: Legends: Season 1
shortSynopsis: As drugs flood the streets of '90s Britain, a team of civil servants is thrust undercover to topple the gangs behind it. Inspired by an untold true story.

title: Raw: 2026 - May 18, 2026
shortSynopsis: Brie Bella & Paige defend the WWE Women's Tag Team Title against Raquel Rodriguez & Roxanne Perez. Oba Femi's "Oba Challenge" resumes.

title: Perfect Match: Season 4
shortSynopsis: More swaps. More sparks. More drama. Reality stars from "Love Is Blind," "Love Island" and more shake up the game, but who'll find their perfect match?

title: Devil May Cry: Season 2
shortSynopsis: A war between worlds ignites as Dante confronts his own devils and must battle the only force that mirrors his own: his estranged twin brother, Vergil.

title: Kylie: Limited Series
shortSynopsis: From soap star to superstar, Kylie's career has been full of twists, turns and spinning around — as she candidly reveals in this unfiltered documentary.

title: Berlin and the Lady with an Ermine: Limited Series
shortSynopsis: Hungry for a new heist, Berlin summons the gang to Seville and turns an ambitious duke into the victim of his own plan: to steal a Da Vinci masterpiece.

title: The WONDERfools: Limited Series
shortSynopsis: A goofy group of townies stumbles into superpowers and fights rising evil as doomsday panic grows in this wild, turn-of-the-century action comedy.

title: My Royal Nemesis: Limited Series
shortSynopsis: A Joseon-era villain doomed to die opens her eyes in modern-day Seoul — where a ruthless chaebol heir may be her last chance to rewrite her fate.

title: Sold Out on You: Limited Series
shortSynopsis: A workaholic home shopping host heads to the countryside to get her show back on top, but a mysterious farmer shakes up her plans — and her heart.

title: Between Father and Son: Season 1
shortSynopsis: In just a few suspenseful minutes, a lawyer's world tilts as her visit to her fiancé's family estate ignites an irresistible bond with her future stepson.

title: Desi Bling: Season 1
shortSynopsis: Glitzy parties and delicious secrets rule the lives of ultra-wealthy Indian expats as they spare no expense — or drama — in this reality series.

title: The Chestnut Man: Hide and Seek
shortSynopsis: After a woman goes missing, the Copenhagen police hunt a stalker who taunts victims with a chilling children's rhyme. Based on the novel "Hide and Seek."

title: Berlin and the Jewels of Paris: Limited Series
shortSynopsis: During his glory days, Berlin and a gang assembled in Paris for one of his greatest plans ever: stealing 44 million euros' worth of jewels in one night.

title: James.: Limited Series
shortSynopsis: James Rodríguez, Colombia's iconic No.10, shares exclusive insights on his rise to fame, scandals and hopes for his team in this documentary series.

title: If Wishes Could Kill: Limited Series
shortSynopsis: A mysterious app promises wishes — then starts a countdown to death. As a group of teens becomes entangled, they must break the deadly chain to survive.
